title: Quran, Sura 49: Al-Hujurat
description: Sura 49 (Al-Hujurat: The Rooms) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 49 (Al-Hujurat: The Rooms) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: O mankind, indeed We have created you from male and female and made you peoples and tribes that you may know one another. Indeed, the most noble of you in the sight of God is the most righteous of you.
